mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(q.qc_qty), 0) AS totalQcQty,
NVL(SUM(q.qc_pass_qty), 0) AS totalPassQty,
NVL( SUM( q.qc_qty - NVL(q.qc_pass_qty, 0) ), 0 ) AS totalDefectQty,
ROUND( NVL( NVL( SUM( q.qc_qty - NVL(q.qc_pass_qty, 0) ), 0 ) / NULLIF(SUM(q.qc_qty), 0) * 100, 0 ), 1 ) AS defectRate
FROM qc q
JOIN lot l ON q.qc_lot = l.lot_id
WHERE q.qc_usage = 'Y'
AND q.qc_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND q.qc_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND l.lot_item = #{itemId}
AND EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM def_log dl
WHERE dl.dlog_qcid = q.qc_id AND dl.dlog_def = #{defTypeId}
)

SELECT q.qc_lot AS lotId, i.item_name AS itemName,
q.qc_qty AS qcQty, q.qc_pass_qty AS qcPassQty,
(q.qc_qty - NVL(q.qc_pass_qty, 0)) AS defectQty,
ROUND( NVL( (q.qc_qty - NVL(q.qc_pass_qty, 0)) / NULLIF(q.qc_qty, 0) * 100, 0 ), 1 ) AS defectRate,
CASE WHEN q.qc_pass_qty = q.qc_qty THEN '합격' WHEN q.qc_pass_qty = 0 THEN '불합격' ELSE '부분합격' END AS qcResult,
TO_CHAR(q.qc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS qcDate
FROM qc q
JOIN lot l ON q.qc_lot = l.lot_id
JOIN item i ON l.lot_item = i.item_id
WHERE q.qc_usage = 'Y'
AND q.qc_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND q.qc_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND l.lot_item = #{itemId}
AND EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM def_log dl
WHERE dl.dlog_qcid = q.qc_id AND dl.dlog_def = #{defTypeId}
)
ORDER BY q.qc_date DESC, q.qc_id DESC

SELECT item_id AS code, item_name AS name
FROM item
WHERE item_usage = 'Y'
ORDER BY item_name

SELECT def_type_id AS code, def_type_name AS name
FROM defect
WHERE def_usage = 'Y'
ORDER BY def_type_name
